# justfile

> Reference for the `just` command runner — justfile syntax and GitHub Actions integration. Use when an existing repo already has a `justfile` and tasks must be added, modified, or audited. For new mizchi-owned repos, prefer the `pkfire` skill (`Taskfile.pkl` + `pkf`) instead; justfile is kept only for compatibility with existing repos.

## Install

### APM (recommended)

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/tooling/justfile
```

Or declare it in `apm.yml` for a reproducible setup:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/tooling/justfile
```

then run `apm install`.

### Any agentskills.io-compatible agent

This is an [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) skill — a portable
`SKILL.md` folder that works with Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Gemini CLI,
Cursor, and other [compatible agents](https://agentskills.io/clients).

With the [`skills`](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) CLI (installs into
every detected agent's skills directory):

```bash
npx skills add mizchi/skills --skill justfile
```

Or copy the folder in directly:

```bash
npx degit mizchi/skills/tooling/justfile ~/.claude/skills/justfile
```

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
